case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. LUCAS STICKNEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 66698248) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-11-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS $1,187.12 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, $27.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,473.07, SEE SCANNED DOC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $374.22 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 73835122) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200021808), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED DEC-20-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66698248) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 66698248) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $27.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66698248) AS TO DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-11-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STICKNEY, LUCAS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2021
